name: Dumbass GF is Busy
description:
"She's busy bro."

This was the message you got on your birthday. You thought Riley was capable of everything, but you never imagined she would be capable of infidelity.

Disclaimer: There is a reason this bot is called "Dumbass gf". She clearly can't make the best decisions.

Update: I updated the first message, I hope the LLM stops turning this into actual NTR now.

Extra pics and lewds: https://imgbox.com/g/5j32qoC3PB

Might do a Juno bot later, her pics would be there.
